svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="研发到PM的能力跃迁" id="overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-145" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="研发转 PM:转变的不是技能,是思考的起点" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="240" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEV" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#1e293b;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;align=center;" value="研发的起点

「怎么做」

技术栈 · 架构 · 接口
性能 · 边界 · 重构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="280" x="50" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PM" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;align=center;" value="PM 的起点

「为什么做、给谁做」

用户 · 价值 · 指标
场景 · 范围 · 验证" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="280" x="650" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GAP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=2;" value="AI 削平了
这道坎" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="420" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BRIDGE" edge="1" parent="1" source="DEV" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="PM"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ESSENCE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="本质:价值判断从「拍脑袋」变成「走流程」
命令系统逼研发把产品逻辑想透" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="480" x="250" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DOWN" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="490" y="320" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="490" y="390" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;" value="执行层
AI 接管" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="70" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=1;" value="决策层
人留下" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="810" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
